_comment: Model page registry (section structure) — the single source for router/sidebar/section-tabs assembly. group → section → models. The first model of each section is the 'main' (one sidebar row); the rest become top tabs on the main page. dir/kind are inferred by assemble.py from the kebab model name + file existence. Copy this to pages-manifest.json, edit, then run: python3 codegen/assemble.py
